title: AutoZone Announces Change to Executive Committee
text: MEMPHIS, Tenn., March 30, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- AutoZone, Inc. (NYSE: AZO), today announced that Jenna Bedsole will join the Company as Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary, Customer Satisfaction.

title: Up More Than 25% in the Past Year, Is AutoZone Stock a Buy?
text: AutoZone generated robust sales and earnings in its latest quarter. The auto parts retail chain is in solid financial health.

title: 2023 Q1 Earnings Preview: What Are Estimates Telling Us?
text: The 2022 Q4 earnings reports displayed that contrary to fears of an impending earnings cliff, companies were largely able to protect their bottom lines. Can they do the same in 2023 Q1?

title: What Has Been 'Genuinely' Reliable Since President Truman In 1948?
